# Purrify

> Purrify is a Canadian-made activated carbon cat litter additive that eliminates ammonia odors at the molecular level. Our all-natural, chemical-free formula uses coconut-based activated carbon to absorb and neutralize unpleasant smells, making homes fresher for cat owners and their feline companions.

## Overview

Purrify provides an eco-friendly solution for cat litter odor control. The product is safe for cats, kittens, and humans, with a simple sprinkle-and-mix application. Available in multiple sizes to suit single-cat households to multi-cat families.

## Key Information

- **Website**: https://www.purrify.ca
- **Contact**: info@purrify.ca
- **Founded**: Canada
- **Product Type**: Pet care / Cat litter additive
- **Key Ingredient**: Activated carbon (coconut-based)

- [Family Pack](https://www.purrify.ca/products/family-pack/) - Large size for multi-cat homes
